title: Add accessible admin login entry point

requirements.text: Add a visible but discreet navigation entry point that allows access to the admin login page (e.g., a small 'Admin' link in the footer or header) so that admins can navigate to /admin from the production site without it being prominently featured for customers.

quotes: now i can see only customer facing webpage

acceptanceCriteria: A link or button to /admin is accessible from the main page on the production site
Navigating to /admin shows the AdminLoginForm (password gate) via ProtectedAdminRoute
The link is unobtrusive (e.g., small text in footer) so it does not distract customers
Unauthenticated users who visit /admin see the login form, not the admin dashboard

constraints: Do not expose admin functionality to unauthenticated users — ProtectedAdminRoute must remain in place
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Modifying the admin dashboard or booking management features
Adding Internet Identity or any other auth method
